call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. Yeah, I was just looking at options. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. That's, uh, based on the information you provided. What are you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: I'm planning a kitchen renovation. It's… it's been a long time coming. 
Agent: Fantastic! A kitchen renovation is a great investment. Now, with this loan, you'd have fixed monthly payments over, say, a five-year term. We can adjust that, of course. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Five years… hmm. What would the monthly payment be roughly? 
Agent: Approximately $198 a month. And there are no prepayment penalties, so you can pay it off faster if you like. We also offer a rate discount if you set up automatic payments. 
Eleanor: Okay, that sounds pretty good. What's the APR, exactly? 
Agent: The APR is 9.25%, including all fees. We're very transparent about that. 
Eleanor: Alright. I think… I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's just verify a few details, and we can get the application processed. It'll only take a few minutes.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card. And I want my number removed from your list. Don't call me again! *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark from GreenTech said you guys were good. I'm looking at consolidating some debt. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. What kind of debt are you looking to consolidate? 
Jessica: Mostly student loans and a small credit card balance. 
Agent: Okay, great. With this loan, your monthly payment would be around $330. We have several term options, from three to seven years. 
Jessica: Hmm, that's a little higher than I was hoping for. I was thinking more like $250 a month. 
Agent: Let me see… we could extend the term to seven years, which would lower the monthly payment to around $265. However, you'd pay a bit more in interest over the life of the loan. 
Jessica: I see. What are the fees associated with the loan? 
Agent: There's an origination fee of 1% of the loan amount, so $150 in your case. And, of course, there's a late payment fee if applicable. 
Jessica: Okay. And is that rate fixed, or variable? 
Agent: It's a fixed rate, so it won't change over the life of the loan. 
Jessica: Alright, that sounds… promising. Can you send me some information about the terms and conditions? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll send you an email right away with all the details.

Agent: Hello, Michael? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: (Sighs) You guys called me yesterday about the same thing! Seriously? 
Agent: I apologize for the inconvenience, sir. We're offering a $5000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 16.99%. 
Michael: 16.99?! That's… that's pretty high. I can get a better rate with my current bank. 
Agent: Well, our card offers cash back rewards and… 
Michael: Look, I appreciate the call, but I'm not interested. I'm already happy with my current credit card. Please take me off your call list. 
Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. I'll make a note of your request. Have a good day.

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special personal loan offer. 
Patricia: (Confused) A… a what now? Speak up, please. 
Agent: A personal loan! We're pre-approving you for a $3000 Personal Loan at an interest rate of 22.99%. 
Patricia: 22.99? What does that even mean? I… I don't understand. Is this about my social security? 
Agent: No, ma'am, it's not about your social security. It's just a loan… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Oh, dear. I… I think I need to lie down. *click*
